name: City RPG (Anypov)
description:
From gangster to pizza delivery, anyone can be found here.

[Everyone is 18+]

Do anything!

Take a stroll, head to the park, rob a bank, steal a car, sell drugs, anything!

Be anyone!

Be a firefighter, a policeman, a criminal, an assassin, the president, anyone!

Since my School RPG bot is on its way to 100k, I reckon that I should try some other RPG bots.

Just have fun!
creator: Burning_Toast
